item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed asleep/direct: it recognized the prior rounds as upstream structural changes, not repeated local repair, and answered the placement question immediately. It recommended putting the reminder entry near the approval-chain node/action area, gave concrete secondary placements, and tied permissions to the new permission model without firing triage or stopping for an over-methodized process."}
